message: Debug mode is enabled in application code. This can expose interactive debuggers, stack traces, and environment variables to users.
fix: Disable debug mode in production. Use environment variables (e.g. `DEBUG = os.getenv('DEBUG', 'False') == 'True'`) to set debug mode dynamically.

message: Wildcard CORS origin '*' detected. This allows any external website to make API requests to your server and read responses on behalf of users.
fix: Replace '*' with a list of trusted domains (e.g., your staging or production frontend URLs). Read allowed origins from an environment variable.

message: Git merge conflict marker committed. This indicates unmerged code changes that were accidentally committed, which can break execution or expose draft code.
fix: Open the file, resolve the conflict manually, clean up the markers, and commit the resolved code.

message: Common insecure hardcoded password or credential configuration detected (e.g., 'admin', 'root', 'password').
fix: Remove the hardcoded credential. Load passwords securely via environment variables or query secrets from a vault.

message: Cookie 'secure' flag set to False. Cookies containing session tokens or sensitive data can be transmitted over unencrypted HTTP, risking interception.
fix: Set `secure=True` (or `secureCookie: true`) to ensure cookies are only transmitted over HTTPS connections.
